/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AVPLightGrid.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAVPLightGrid.so -o libAVPLightGrid.so CMakeFiles/AVPLightGrid.dir/grid/AVPLightGrid.C.o  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/abd-faiyaz/Files/tozoni-2016-implementation/build: libIGrid.so libPolygonWithHolesExt.so libPolygonExt.so /usr/lib64/libgmpxx.so /lib64/libmpfr.so /lib64/libgmp.so
